description.ko: 유기적 생명체와 디지털 구조 사이의 경계를 탐구하는 FLORA-9은 자연이 흙과 물 대신 데이터와 빛을 통해 번성하도록 진화한 세계를 묘사합니다.
description.en: An exploration of the boundary between organic life and digital constructs, FLORA-9 depicts a world where nature has evolved to thrive on data and light rather than soil and water.

prompt: A high-resolution cinematic shot of a futuristic botanical organism, FLORA-9, featuring translucent iridescent petals with embedded micro-circuitry and glowing fiber-optic veins. The plant is situated in a surreal digital landscape where organic roots merge with flowing data streams and neon liquid mercury. Soft bokeh background of a cybernetic forest, ethereal lighting, hyper-realistic textures, 8k resolution, unreal engine 5 render style.
